_comment: Schema-only file for competitor channel intelligence. Populated by competitor-scan atom during research runs. Never pre-seeded with guesses — all values null until a competitor-scan run retrieves and records them. Metrics must be labeled [unverified] unless pulled from a confirmed API response. Updated per-research, not on a schedule.

schema.channel_name: string — display name as it appears on the platform
schema.url_if_found: string or null — direct URL to the channel/account, null if not confirmed
schema.scale_tier: nano (under 10k) | micro (10k to 100k) | mid (100k to 500k) | macro (500k plus) — label [unverified] unless from platform API
schema.primary_aesthetic: string — one-sentence description of the channel's visual identity
content_pillars_overlap: string — pillars from Creator OS that this channel also covers
schema.differentiation_notes: string — where this channel is different from the creator's positioning
overserved_topics: string — topics this channel covers heavily that the creator should treat as saturated
underserved_topics: string — topics this channel does not cover that represent a gap opportunity
top_performing_formats: string — formats (tutorial, haul, transformation, etc.) that perform well for this channel
schema.source_artifact_id: string or null — artifact ID from web-intel-engine retrieval that sourced this record
